name: RudderstackConnector
description: Connects to RudderStack (open-source CDP) — two surfaces: data plane (HTTP Basic with write_key) for event ingestion (track / identify / page / screen / group / alias / batch), and control plane (Bearer with personal access token) for sources, destinations, connections, workspaces, profiles, and identities.

install_fields.label: Write Key
install_fields.help: Source Write Key from RudderStack → Sources → your source → Write Key. Sent as HTTP Basic username (with empty password) on every data-plane call.

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: Personal Access Token from RudderStack → Settings → Personal Access Tokens. Required to manage sources / destinations / connections / workspaces / profiles via the control plane. Leave blank for data-plane-only use.

install_fields.label: Data Plane URL
install_fields.help: Data plane base URL. Default is the RudderStack-hosted endpoint. Override only for self-hosted / private regions.

install_fields.label: Control Plane URL
install_fields.help: Management API base URL. Override only if you self-host the control plane.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum RudderStack API requests per minute. Default is 100.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates write_key (required) and persists install config. Does NOT call any RudderStack endpoint.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: If a PAT is set, probes the control plane (GET /sources?limit=1). Otherwise reports HEALTHY when write_key is present (data plane has no idempotent GET).

apis.name: List Workspaces
apis.description: GET /workspaces — list workspaces accessible to the PAT.

apis.name: List Sources
apis.description: GET /sources — list workspace sources with cursor pagination.

apis.name: Create Source
apis.description: POST /sources — create a source of a given type (Javascript, Python, HTTP, …).

apis.name: List Profiles
apis.description: GET /profiles — list unified user profiles via the Profiles API.

apis.name: List Identities
apis.description: GET /identities — list identity records across sources.

apis.name: Track Event
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/track — record a user action (data plane, HTTP Basic with write_key).

apis.name: Identify User
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/identify — set user identity and traits.

apis.name: Page View
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/page — record a web page-view event.

apis.name: Screen View
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/screen — record a mobile screen-view event.

apis.name: Group Association
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/group — associate user with a group/account.

apis.name: Alias User
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/alias — link a new userId to a previousId.

apis.name: Batch Events
apis.description: POST {data_plane}/v1/batch — submit multiple events in one request.
